title: IPCC 2019 cropland soil-carbon stock-change factors, tropical wet (Ghana)
description: Relative soil organic carbon stock-change factors over 20 years for cropland management, IPCC 2019 Refinement Vol 4 Table 5.5. Extracted from FAO EX-ACT v9.4.2 (IPCC sheet, row 66 'Tropical wet', Ghana's climate zone). These back the soil-carbon effect of the tillage and organic-input measures with a modelled, tropical-specific factor rather than a screening estimate.

interpretation.no_till_vs_full_till: No tillage raises the SOC stock factor from 1.0 to 1.10, i.e. ~+10% soil carbon over 20 years vs full tillage.
interpretation.manure_vs_medium_input: High input with manure raises the FI factor from 1.0 to 1.44, i.e. ~+44% soil carbon over 20 years vs medium input without manure.

provenance.span: Relative Carbon stock change factors (FLU, FMG, FI) over 20 years for management activities on cropland; Tropical wet: FMG full 1.0, reduced 1.04, no tillage 1.10; FI low 0.92, medium 1.0, high no manure 1.11, high with manure 1.44. TABLE 5.5 (UPDATED), IPCC 2019.
provenance.underlying: IPCC 2019 Refinement to the 2006 Guidelines, Vol 4 (AFOLU), Table 5.5
provenance.licence: FAO EX-ACT free/unrestricted; underlying IPCC factors (see LICENCES.md)
provenance.extracted_by: pyxlsb read of the IPCC sheet, 2026-07-17
